Description: The name or title of this organization.
The name of the parent organization. For schools, enter the name of the school district.
If this organization also goes by another name, enter it here.
The display name of the organization, for use in drop-down menus in other lists.
The full mailing address for this organization.
Main phone or PBX number for this organization.
Primary fax number for this organization.
Primary contact email for this organization, typically the customer service email.
The primary contact at this organization, typically an account manager, owner, or school social worker.
If the communication or work with this organization is done through a third-party, enter the contact person at that third-party here.
If applicable, the sales contact at this organization.
If applicable, the technical contact at this organization.
The primary leadership contact at this organization. For schools, enter the principal name.
